cron.description: 5-field POSIX cron expression OR 6-field (with seconds) — host MAY accept either format. Example: `0 9 * * MON` = every Monday at 09:00. Hosts MUST reject sub-minute schedules in 5-field form.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name (e.g., `'America/New_York'`, `'Asia/Tokyo'`, `'UTC'`). Hosts MUST resolve via the system tz database. Invalid timezones return `invalid_timezone` at workflow-register time.

missedFirePolicy.description: What the host does when the workflow was offline through scheduled fires. `skip` = do nothing. `fire-once` = fire one catch-up run with the LATEST missed timestamp. `fire-all` = fire one run per missed timestamp (bounded; hosts MAY cap to avoid backlog explosion).
